issues.description: Effect 1 (OnKO) is incomplete. The card text states 'If your [Trafalgar Law] would be K.O.'d, you may add 1 card from the top of your Life cards to your hand instead.' This requires a conditional prevention mechanism: when Trafalgar Law would be KO'd, FlipLife instead. The DSL must include a cost check or payment gate (DON or similar) and should conditionally prevent KO. Current DSL does not capture the 'instead of being KO'd' mechanic.

Effect 2 (Activated) is completely wrong. The card text describes a DON!! −1 activated ability that reduces the cost of the next [Trafalgar Law] with cost 4+ played from hand by 2 during this turn. The DSL instead shows SearchDeck for Trafalgar Law to hand, which is not mentioned in the card text. The effect should apply a cost reduction modifier to future Trafalgar Law plays, not search the deck.

HasCardOnBoard is insufficient context. The condition should verify [Trafalgar Law] specifically is on board AND would be KO'd (trigger context). The trigger should be OnKO with a name filter, not just HasCardOnBoard.
Activated trigger lacks cost specification. DSL should include DON!! −1 cost as part of the activation constraint.

suggestedDsl.note: Prevents KO; instead flips 1 Life to hand
